context: Here's how it might look on your whiteboard:

caption: Users should be able to upload a file from any device
Users should be able to upload a file from any device
Users should be able to download a file from any device
context: Use the presigned URL to download the file from the Blob Storage service directly to the client.

caption: Users should be able to download a file from any device
context: When a user requests a file, we can use the CDN to serve the file from the server closest to the user. This is much faster than serving the file from our backend or the Blob Storage service.

caption: Sync
context: This hybrid approach gives us the best of both worlds — real-time updates through push notifications, with polling as a reliable fallback to guarantee no changes are ever lost.

caption: Final
context: Let's take a step back and look at our system as a whole. At this point, we have a simple design that satisfies all of our functional requirements.
